content_body: The Suarez-Richards Fmaily had a wonderful long weekend in this beautiful Blue Ridge cabin! it was everything it promsed and more! We have stayed at many luxury cabin rentals over the years and I must say, this one was by far the most elegant and well-appointed. During our stay we celebrated my daughter's 5th grade graduation, my brother's birthday, and Memorial Day and the memories we made will live in my heart for years! We hope to be back soon!
title: Memorial Day Weekend in Blue Ridge, GA
